name: The Cake
short_description: Deliver a birthday cake to your beloved daughter! Avoid oncoming passersby and aim for the goal! If the cake collapses when it hits someone, you will die instantly! A casual but highly difficult action game.
detailed_description:
Today is my beloved daughter's birthday.
Annoying passersby are blocking Dad's path to bring home his birthday cake! ?
If you collide, your precious cake will be ruined!
Avoid the approaching passersby and aim for the goal!
A casual but highly difficult action game.



Move and avoid hitting passersby!




If you are about to collide, take an emergency evasion!




Confront the boss at the end of the stage!




Even if the game is over, don't give up and try again and again!


　
　
　

Video Streaming Guidelines

- Streaming is possible for individuals and corporations without permission.
- Monetization is only possible using the functions provided by the video streaming site.
- We would appreciate it if you could include the name of the game in the title of your video or stream, and include a link to the Steam page in the description section or elsewhere.
- We are not responsible for any damages caused by streaming videos of this game.
*The contents of these guidelines may change without notice.
　
　
　

Official gameplay video
